mapper.select: SELECT SCENARIO_ID, PROJECT_ID, PROJECT_NAME, SCENARIO_NAME, TARGET_ENV, CAST(BASE_DATE AS VARCHAR) AS BASE_DATE, VERSION_NO, AUTHOR, DESCRIPTION, PURPOSE, STATUS, CURRENT_STEP, STEP_PAYLOAD, CAST(CREATED_AT AS VARCHAR) AS CREATED_AT, CAST(UPDATED_AT AS VARCHAR) AS UPDATED_AT FROM CAP_NEW_SCENARIO ORDER BY UPDATED_AT DESC

SELECT SCENARIO_ID, PROJECT_ID, PROJECT_NAME, SCENARIO_NAME, TARGET_ENV, CAST(BASE_DATE AS VARCHAR) AS BASE_DATE, VERSION_NO, AUTHOR, DESCRIPTION, PURPOSE, STATUS, CURRENT_STEP, STEP_PAYLOAD, CAST(CREATED_AT AS VARCHAR) AS CREATED_AT, CAST(UPDATED_AT AS VARCHAR) AS UPDATED_AT FROM CAP_NEW_SCENARIO WHERE SCENARIO_ID = #{scenarioId}
mapper.update: UPDATE CAP_NEW_SCENARIO SET PROJECT_ID = #{projectId}, PROJECT_NAME = #{projectName}, SCENARIO_NAME = #{scenarioName}, TARGET_ENV = #{targetEnv}, BASE_DATE = #{baseDate}, VERSION_NO = #{versionNo}, AUTHOR = #{author}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, PURPOSE = #{purpose}, STATUS = #{status}, CURRENT_STEP = #{currentStep}, STEP_PAYLOAD = #{stepPayload}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE SCENARIO_ID = #{scenarioId}
